title: August 8
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Youmay|the real-world day|the [[in-universe]] [[August 8 (in-universe)|August 8]]}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 8''' is the 220th day of the year (221st in leap years), with 145 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 76|''Star Wars Weekly'' 76]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 60|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 60]] published.
*[[1993]] – [[Mickey Morton]] dies.
*[[1995]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 2|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 2]] published.
*[[2007]] – [[Rebellion 9|''Rebellion'' 9]] published.
*2007 – [[Legacy (2006) 15|''Legacy'' (2006) 15]] published.
*[[2012]] – [[Knight Errant: Escape 3|''Knight Errant: Escape'' 3]] published.
*2012 – [[Lost Tribe of the Sith—Spiral 1|''Lost Tribe of the Sith—Spiral'' 1]] published.
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 8|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 8]] published in Germany.
*[[2016]] – "[[The Maker of Zoh]]" premieres on Disney XD.
*[[2017]] – ''[[Spark of Rebellion: A Star Wars Rebels Cinestory Comic]]'' published.
*2017 – "[[The Pit and the Pinnacle]]" premieres on Disney XD.
*[[2018]] – [[Darth Vader (2017) 19|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 19]] published.
*[[2022]] – [[Tom Palmer]] dies.
*2022 – [[Star Wars Day-at-a-Time Calendar 2023|''Star Wars'' Day-at-a-Time Calendar 2023]] published.
